business.name: Pee Dee Junk Removal
business.tagline: Clear it out, haul it off

hero.headline: *One call* — your mess becomes our mission
hero.subheadline: From attics to old cars, we haul what others won't touch

services_section.label: WHAT WE HAUL
services_section.heading: If it needs to go, we'll take it
services_section.subheading: Residential and commercial cleanouts done right

services.title: Attic & Storage Cleanouts
services.description: Decades of stuff tucked away? We'll clear every corner and sweep up behind ourselves.

services.title: Yard Debris Removal
services.description: Fallen trees, old equipment, scrap metal — if it's cluttering your property, we'll haul it.

services.title: Large Item Pickup
services.description: Appliances, furniture, old vehicles — the stuff that won't fit in a regular trash pickup.

services.title: Estate Cleanouts
services.description: Respectful, thorough clearing of entire properties when life changes happen.

about.heading: Mike and his Florence team
about.body: We show up when scheduled, quote fair prices, and clean up after ourselves. Real trucks, real crew, real results.

reviews.name: Van W.
reviews.text: Great job cleaning out attic, storage building and removing large yard items. Did everything I asked and cleaned up too.

reviews.name: Andrew C.
reviews.text: Came out one day after quote request, great price, scheduled within five days. Communicated well, on time, outstanding job.

reviews.name: Brittany H.
reviews.text: Used them twice in recent years. Large cleanup after divorce including an old car. Fast, friendly, got everything cleared out.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Pee Dee region
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across Florence County

cta.heading: Ready to reclaim your space?
cta.body: Free quotes over the phone. Most jobs scheduled within a week.
